deck.name: Default Tarot
deck.description: A standard 78 card tarot deck for daily readings.

cards.name: The Fool
cards.upright_meaning: A fresh start, open possibility, and the courage to step forward.
cards.reversed_meaning: Hesitation, scattered energy, or a leap taken without enough care.

cards.name: The Magician
cards.upright_meaning: Focused will, useful tools, and the ability to shape intention into action.
cards.reversed_meaning: Unclear motives, unused talent, or energy scattered in too many directions.

cards.name: The High Priestess
cards.upright_meaning: Quiet knowing, intuition, and truths that reveal themselves in stillness.
cards.reversed_meaning: Ignoring intuition, secrecy, or difficulty trusting what you already sense.

cards.name: The Empress
cards.upright_meaning: Nurture, creativity, and the growth that comes from patient care.
cards.reversed_meaning: Creative blocks, overgiving, or neglecting your own needs.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.upright_meaning: Order, leadership, boundaries, and a stable foundation.
cards.reversed_meaning: Rigidity, control issues, or unstable structure.

cards.name: The Hierophant
cards.upright_meaning: Guidance, shared wisdom, and learning through established paths.
cards.reversed_meaning: Questioning rules, outgrowing tradition, or needing your own spiritual language.

cards.name: The Lovers
cards.upright_meaning: Alignment, meaningful choice, and connection based on shared values.
cards.reversed_meaning: Disharmony, divided priorities, or a choice made against the heart.

cards.name: The Chariot
cards.upright_meaning: Determination, forward motion, and control through inner discipline.
cards.reversed_meaning: Lack of direction, force without focus, or losing the reins.

cards.name: Strength
cards.upright_meaning: Gentle courage, emotional mastery, and patient strength.
cards.reversed_meaning: Self-doubt, impatience, or reacting from fear instead of steadiness.

cards.name: The Hermit
cards.upright_meaning: Inner searching, reflection, and wisdom found away from noise.
cards.reversed_meaning: Isolation, avoidance, or refusing guidance that could help.

cards.name: Wheel of Fortune
cards.upright_meaning: A turning point, changing fortune, and trust in the movement of cycles.
cards.reversed_meaning: Resistance to change, poor timing, or feeling stuck in a repeating pattern.

cards.name: Justice
cards.upright_meaning: Clarity, fairness, and consequences aligned with choices.
cards.reversed_meaning: Avoided truth, imbalance, or unwillingness to take responsibility.

cards.name: The Hanged Man
cards.upright_meaning: A meaningful pause, surrender, and a new perspective.
cards.reversed_meaning: Stalling, resentment, or refusing to see from another angle.

cards.name: Death
cards.upright_meaning: An ending that clears space for transformation and renewal.
cards.reversed_meaning: Clinging to what is over, delayed change, or fear of transition.

cards.name: Temperance
cards.upright_meaning: Integration, patience, and healing through balanced action.
cards.reversed_meaning: Excess, imbalance, or trying to force harmony too quickly.

cards.name: The Devil
cards.upright_meaning: Awareness of attachment, shadow patterns, and what has power over you.
cards.reversed_meaning: Breaking chains, reclaiming choice, or seeing through an illusion.

cards.name: The Tower
cards.upright_meaning: Sudden truth, disruption, and the fall of what cannot hold.
cards.reversed_meaning: Avoided collapse, slow rebuilding, or fear of necessary change.

cards.name: The Star
cards.upright_meaning: Hope, renewal, and a quiet sense of guidance after difficulty.
cards.reversed_meaning: Discouragement, dimmed faith, or needing to reconnect with trust.

cards.name: The Moon
cards.upright_meaning: Dreams, uncertainty, and messages from the hidden self.
cards.reversed_meaning: Confusion clearing, anxiety easing, or illusions being named.

cards.name: The Sun
cards.upright_meaning: Warmth, clarity, success, and the simple joy of being alive.
cards.reversed_meaning: Delayed joy, low confidence, or needing to let light in.

cards.name: Judgement
cards.upright_meaning: A call to rise, review the past, and choose with new awareness.
cards.reversed_meaning: Self-judgment, ignoring a call, or fear of stepping into renewal.

cards.name: The World
cards.upright_meaning: Completion, integration, and the satisfaction of a cycle fulfilled.
cards.reversed_meaning: Loose ends, delayed closure, or needing to embody the lesson.

cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: A new emotional opening, tenderness, and the beginning of heartfelt flow.
cards.reversed_meaning: Guarded feelings, emotional overflow, or difficulty receiving care.

cards.name: Two of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: A mutual bond, honest exchange, and emotional recognition.
cards.reversed_meaning: Mismatch, disconnection, or a relationship needing repair.

cards.name: Three of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Friendship, celebration, and support shared among kindred hearts.
cards.reversed_meaning: Social strain, exclusion, or celebration that feels hollow.

cards.name: Four of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Emotional pause, reflection, and an offer that may be easy to miss.
cards.reversed_meaning: Re-engagement, renewed interest, or choosing to notice what is present.

cards.name: Five of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Grief, disappointment, and the need to honor what was lost.
cards.reversed_meaning: Acceptance, returning hope, or seeing what still remains.

cards.name: Six of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Memory, innocence, and kindness rooted in the past.
cards.reversed_meaning: Living in nostalgia, old patterns, or needing to grow beyond the past.

cards.name: Seven of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Many possibilities, imagination, and the need to choose clearly.
cards.reversed_meaning: Clarity after confusion, narrowed options, or illusions falling away.

cards.name: Eight of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Walking away from what no longer nourishes the heart.
cards.reversed_meaning: Fear of leaving, unfinished emotion, or returning for closure.

cards.name: Nine of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Contentment, pleasure, and a wish close to fulfillment.
cards.reversed_meaning: Surface satisfaction, excess, or asking what truly fulfills you.

cards.name: Ten of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Emotional harmony, belonging, and joy shared with others.
cards.reversed_meaning: Strained harmony, idealized happiness, or family expectations.

cards.name: Page of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: A tender message, creative sensitivity, and emotional curiosity.
cards.reversed_meaning: Emotional immaturity, shyness, or difficulty expressing feelings.

cards.name: Knight of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Following the heart, romance, and movement guided by feeling.
cards.reversed_meaning: Moodiness, fantasy without action, or an unreliable invitation.

cards.name: Queen of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Deep empathy, intuitive care, and emotional wisdom.
cards.reversed_meaning: Absorbing others' feelings, blurred boundaries, or emotional depletion.

cards.name: King of Cups
cards.upright_meaning: Emotional steadiness, compassion, and mature guidance.
cards.reversed_meaning: Emotional control, avoidance, or calm used to hide turmoil.

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: A practical opportunity, new resource, or seed of material growth.
cards.reversed_meaning: Missed opportunity, unstable ground, or a seed not yet planted.

cards.name: Two of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Balancing priorities, adapting, and staying flexible with resources.
cards.reversed_meaning: Overwhelm, dropped responsibilities, or unsustainable juggling.

cards.name: Three of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Skillful work, collaboration, and building something with care.
cards.reversed_meaning: Poor coordination, undervalued work, or skills needing refinement.

cards.name: Four of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Security, saving, and protecting what has been earned.
cards.reversed_meaning: Clinging, fear of loss, or learning to loosen your grip.

cards.name: Five of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Material hardship, isolation, and the need to seek support.
cards.reversed_meaning: Recovery, help arriving, or finding a way back inside.

cards.name: Six of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Generosity, fair exchange, and giving or receiving help.
cards.reversed_meaning: Unequal exchange, strings attached, or discomfort receiving.

cards.name: Seven of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Patient assessment, long-term growth, and tending what you planted.
cards.reversed_meaning: Impatience, poor investment, or questioning whether effort is worth it.

cards.name: Eight of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Practice, dedication, and mastery built through repeated effort.
cards.reversed_meaning: Perfectionism, boredom, or work done without attention.

cards.name: Nine of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Self-sufficiency, comfort, and the reward of steady work.
cards.reversed_meaning: Dependence, overwork, or not allowing yourself to enjoy success.

cards.name: Ten of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Legacy, shared stability, and material support across time.
cards.reversed_meaning: Family strain, unstable legacy, or values that need rethinking.

cards.name: Page of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: A practical student, careful planning, and a grounded new path.
cards.reversed_meaning: Procrastination, lack of follow-through, or needing better habits.

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Steady progress, responsibility, and patient persistence.
cards.reversed_meaning: Stagnation, stubbornness, or routine becoming a cage.

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Practical care, resourcefulness, and comfort made tangible.
cards.reversed_meaning: Neglecting the body, overextending care, or insecurity around resources.

cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.upright_meaning: Stable success, material wisdom, and responsible leadership.
cards.reversed_meaning: Greed, rigidity, or measuring worth only by achievement.

cards.name: Ace of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: A clear truth, mental breakthrough, and decisive insight.
cards.reversed_meaning: Confusion, harsh words, or a truth not yet ready to be spoken.

cards.name: Two of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: A difficult choice, mental pause, and the need for balanced judgment.
cards.reversed_meaning: Indecision ending, avoidance exposed, or pressure to choose.

cards.name: Three of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Heartache, painful truth, and the release that comes through honesty.
cards.reversed_meaning: Healing, forgiveness, or pain held too long inside.

cards.name: Four of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Rest, recovery, and the quiet needed before the next move.
cards.reversed_meaning: Restlessness, burnout, or returning before you are ready.

cards.name: Five of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Conflict, hollow victory, and the cost of needing to win.
cards.reversed_meaning: Making peace, choosing not to fight, or lingering resentment.

cards.name: Six of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Moving toward calmer waters, transition, and gradual mental relief.
cards.reversed_meaning: Resistance to moving on, old thoughts returning, or delayed passage.

cards.name: Seven of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Strategy, discretion, and choosing your moves carefully.
cards.reversed_meaning: Deception revealed, self-sabotage, or the need for honesty.

cards.name: Eight of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Mental restriction, fear, and limits that may be partly believed into place.
cards.reversed_meaning: Freeing yourself, seeing options, or challenging old beliefs.

cards.name: Nine of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Anxiety, sleepless thought, and worries asking to be named.
cards.reversed_meaning: Relief, reaching out, or refusing to suffer alone.

cards.name: Ten of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: A painful ending, exhaustion, and the finality that allows release.
cards.reversed_meaning: Recovery after collapse, survival, or difficulty accepting an ending.

cards.name: Page of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Curiosity, quick thought, and a message that cuts through fog.
cards.reversed_meaning: Gossip, defensiveness, or speaking before understanding.

cards.name: Knight of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Swift action, bold words, and charging toward a clear goal.
cards.reversed_meaning: Rashness, aggression, or moving too fast to see consequences.

cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Clear discernment, honest speech, and strong boundaries.
cards.reversed_meaning: Coldness, bitterness, or truth used without compassion.

cards.name: King of Swords
cards.upright_meaning: Clear authority, logic, and decisions guided by principle.
cards.reversed_meaning: Misuse of intellect, harsh judgment, or detached control.

cards.name: Ace of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: A spark of inspiration, creative potential, and energy ready to move.
cards.reversed_meaning: Blocked spark, delay, or inspiration without direction.

cards.name: Two of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Vision, planning, and choosing where to direct your fire.
cards.reversed_meaning: Fear of expansion, limited vision, or plans without commitment.

cards.name: Three of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Expansion, watching results approach, and preparing for a wider horizon.
cards.reversed_meaning: Delays, shrinking plans, or impatience with distant outcomes.

cards.name: Four of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Celebration, belonging, and a joyful milestone with others.
cards.reversed_meaning: Unstable home, delayed celebration, or belonging that feels uncertain.

cards.name: Five of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Friction, competition, and creative tension that tests your energy.
cards.reversed_meaning: Avoiding conflict, scattered effort, or tension beginning to settle.

cards.name: Six of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Recognition, confidence, and a victory that can be shared.
cards.reversed_meaning: Private success, self-doubt, or recognition that feels unstable.

cards.name: Seven of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Standing your ground, defending your position, and courageous persistence.
cards.reversed_meaning: Exhaustion, defensiveness, or choosing which battles matter.

cards.name: Eight of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Fast movement, messages, and energy rapidly finding direction.
cards.reversed_meaning: Delays, miscommunication, or momentum that needs coordination.

cards.name: Nine of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Resilience, guarded strength, and continuing despite fatigue.
cards.reversed_meaning: Burnout, paranoia, or the need to lower defenses carefully.

cards.name: Ten of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Heavy responsibility, burdens carried near the finish line.
cards.reversed_meaning: Releasing weight, delegation, or refusing burdens that are not yours.

cards.name: Page of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Enthusiasm, exploration, and the first brave spark of adventure.
cards.reversed_meaning: Restlessness, false starts, or fear of trying something new.

cards.name: Knight of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Passionate movement, bold risk, and energy that wants experience.
cards.reversed_meaning: Impulsiveness, inconsistency, or fire that burns out quickly.

cards.name: Queen of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Confidence, warmth, and magnetic creative presence.
cards.reversed_meaning: Insecurity, jealousy, or dimming your own fire.

cards.name: King of Wands
cards.upright_meaning: Visionary leadership, bold action, and the courage to inspire others.
cards.reversed_meaning: Impulsiveness, domination, or vision without grounded follow-through.
